features.name: Robust Progress State Architecture - Event Sourcing & Reconciliation
test_steps: Configure Git union merge for audit.log via .gitattributes
Define event schema whitelist (feature_completed, feature_undone, state_restored, tracker_reset, manual_state_override)
Implement reconcile-state command with drift detection and auto-ingestion
Add post-merge Git hook that auto-commits reconciled progress.json
Verify Feature 9 state recovery through audit.log replay
Test union merge behavior with concurrent audit.log appends
Validate manual state override events are properly recorded and replayed

change_spec.why: Implement Event Sourcing pattern to prevent progress state loss during Git merges. The current single-file progress.json approach loses completed state when merge conflicts are resolved by picking base branch version. This architecture uses audit.log as the single source of truth with union merge strategy, automatic reconciliation, and full audit trail for all state changes including manual edits.
in_scope: Git union merge configuration for audit.log
Event schema whitelist and normalization
Reconciliation module with drift detection
Manual state override event recording
Post-merge Git hook with auto-commit
Feature 9 immediate repair through automated backfill
out_of_scope: Modifying core business logic of existing commands
Changing the progress.json schema structure
Implementing new quality gates or review processes
risks: Union merge edge cases with concurrent appends may require deduplication logic
Event ordering issues if branches append different events simultaneously
Git hook requires user.name/user.email configuration
Schema evolution needs version field for future compatibility

acceptance_scenarios: Scenario: Git merge of audit.log uses union strategy without conflicts
Scenario: reconcile-state correctly replays events and reconstructs state
Scenario: Manual edits to progress.json are recorded as manual_state_override events
Scenario: Post-merge hook auto-commits reconciled progress.json with [skip ci]
Scenario: Feature 9 state is recovered through audit.log replay after merge
Scenario: Duplicate events are properly deduplicated during reconciliation

defects: I-01: manual_state_override event type whitelisted but no call-site detects/records manual edits to progress.json — acceptance scenario 3 partially unmet
I-02: append_audit_record temp-file pattern provides no atomicity guarantee; code misleadingly suggests atomic rename semantics
I-03: state_restored event type whitelisted but never emitted
S-01: _write_audit_event test helper uses mutable default arg counter=[0]
S-02: deduplicate_audit_log in-memory only; never writes deduped records back to audit.log
S-03: post_merge_hook.sh $? in warn block captures echo exit code not reconcile-state exit code

sprint_contract.scope: Implement Event Sourcing architecture for robust progress state management
done_criteria: Git union merge configured and tested
Event schema whitelist defined and documented
reconcile-state command implemented and tested
Post-merge Git hook installed and functional
Feature 9 state recovered and verified
All acceptance scenarios validated
test_plan: Configure .gitattributes with audit.log merge=union
Test union merge with concurrent audit.log appends
Implement event schema whitelist in audit_log.py
Implement reconcile-state command in progress_manager.py
Add manual_state_override event recording
Create post-merge hook script
Run prog install-git-hooks
Verify Feature 9 state recovery
Run integration tests for reconciliation flow

defects.description: Extra test test_update_progress_json_writes_ship_check_result not in plan (Task 3 planned 3 tests, implementation has 4). Justified: validates persistence function directly.
_collect_real_signals has extra subprocess.TimeoutExpired and general Exception handling not in original plan. Justified: fail-closed defensive programming for robustness.

__main__ block has try/except SystemExit wrapper remapping argparse exit code 2 (usage/help errors) to 8 (fail). Not in original plan. Justified: fail-closed — argparse errors should not escape as exit 2.

progress_manager.py modified beyond plan scope: removed dead code (_validate_completion_reconcile, _validate_completion_plan_document, _finalize_completion_state_in_memory, _record_feature_completed_event, _append_capability_memory), simplified determine_recovery_action, added dirty_on_default_branch handling in analyze_git_auto_preflight. Plan said 'Existing library API and 7 passing tests are untouched.' However, all 855 tests pass with zero regressions and changes are cleanup/consolidation.

Score range 0-100, buckets simple/standard/complex with confidence field for uncertainty handling.

out_of_scope: Changing determine_complexity_bucket thresholds in progress_manager.py
Modifying feature-implement routing logic beyond Step 3
Changing team dispatch or Codex integration
risks: Haiku scoring accuracy may differ from current scoring — threshold (38/63) may need calibration after rollout
Haiku subagent unavailability: must fail open to coordinator self-scoring fallback

features.name: Unified work-item intake and profile routing (task/feature/bug) via /prog next
test_steps: Run: prog smart '<long discussion>' → output shows candidate list with type/confidence/profile fields; no JSON mutation occurs before confirmation.
Run: prog smart '<ambiguous input>' → exactly one clarification question printed; re-run with confirmation → record written with details/refs/next_action preserved.
Run: prog smart '<clear bug report>' → bug written to bugs[] AND routing_queue contains new bug-id with correct priority weight.
Run: prog next → P0 bug appears above standalone tasks in selection output; priority order matches P0>P1>task>feature_task>P2 policy.
Run: prog add-feature / add-bug / add-update → commands succeed without regression; /prog-fix contract unchanged.

change_spec.why: Current intake can collapse rich discussions into sparse notes. Introduce unified work-item intake with profile-aware routing so discussions are decomposed into actionable artifacts without forcing every item into full feature workflow.
in_scope: Define work-item taxonomy used by intake: epic|feature|task|bug|spike|risk|decision|update.
Define workflow profiles: quick_task|standard_task|feature_delivery|hotfix with explicit branch/verification/done policies.
Design deterministic intake contract: candidate list -> clarification (if needed) -> explicit confirmation -> commit writes.
Design /prog next routing precedence: P0 bug > P1 bug > standalone task > active feature task > P2 bug > next feature.
Persist rich context fields (details, refs, next_action, rationale) to avoid title-only loss.
Add workflow_profile field to work-item records (tasks and features); allowed values: quick_task|standard_task|feature_delivery|hotfix; default: standard_task.
When bug intake writes to bugs[], simultaneously push bug-id into routing_queue with priority weight (P0=critical, P1=high, P2=normal).
Extend wf_state_machine.py to handle new profile states; compute_next_action() must never return None for any valid profile state.
out_of_scope: Immediate removal of legacy features/bugs/updates collections before compatibility adapters exist.
Automatic no-confirmation mutation for ambiguous intents.
Rewriting bug lifecycle semantics in /prog-fix.
risks: Misclassification can still occur on mixed-intent input; must enforce confidence + clarification gate.
Routing ambiguity between task and feature can confuse users without explicit output contract in /prog next.
Schema expansion without migration plan may break downstream readers.

acceptance_scenarios: Scenario: mixed discussion is decomposed into multiple candidate items with confidence and explicit write confirmation.
Scenario: ambiguous item is blocked from mutation until user confirms the target type/profile.
Scenario: committed items retain execution-ready fields (summary/details/refs/next_action) instead of title-only entries.
Scenario: /prog next deterministic priority order matches profile policy and current runtime context.
Scenario: existing CLI write commands remain valid and produce no regressions.

defects.description: add_feature() does not include workflow_profile field. change_spec requires: Add workflow_profile field to work-item records (tasks and features). Only add_task_item() sets it.

eng.evidence: code_review: all 945 tests pass, 19 new F13 tests cover smart_intake and _select_next_work_item, evaluator gate pass (95/100)

qa.evidence: acceptance: 5/5 test steps passed — preview no-mutation, ambiguous clarification, bug commit+routing_queue, next alias, add-feature/add-bug/add-update regression-free

docs.evidence: plan: docs/plans/2026-05-11-f13-unified-intake-detailed.md validated, PROG_COMMANDS.md updated with smart command, new command/skill docs added

sprint_contract.scope: prog smart CLI deterministic executor; _select_next_work_item unified selector; workflow_profile taxonomy; wf_state_machine intake/task states; prog next alias
done_criteria: 945 tests passing (926 existing + 19 new)
test_plan: test_unified_selection.py: 8 tests (priority ordering/skip/fallback)

features.name: Task execution semantics and visibility (standalone task vs feature task) with profile-aware done gates
test_steps: Run: prog next → selects quick_task; verify a short-lived branch is created automatically.
Run: prog next --done on active quick_task → squash-merge succeeds, branch deleted, exactly 1 commit added to main; no feature done gate triggered.
Run: prog next --done on feature-bound task → task marked complete, parent feature progress advances, parent feature NOT auto-closed.
Run: prog next --done on quick_task → confirm close path does not trigger MUTATING_COMMANDS outer lock (no 10s timeout / RC=9).
Run: prog status → actionable updates shown; stale P0/P1 bugs displayed as warnings; hidden-history count shown; list-updates returns full unfiltered history.

change_spec.why: Small tasks should not be forced through heavy feature completion gates. Need a clear split between standalone tasks and feature-subtasks while preserving observability in /prog status.
prerequisites: F13 must be shipped: workflow_profile taxonomy, schema extension, and intake contract must be merged before F14 execution.
in_scope: Define execution semantics for standalone task and feature task under current workflow_state model.
Define /prog next --done shortcut behavior for profiles that allow lightweight closure.
Define done-gate matrix by workflow_profile (none/light/standard/strict).
All workflow profiles create a short-lived branch on start; quick_task branches have minimal lifetime but still squash-merge on close — no profile commits directly to main mid-task.
Extend /prog next CLI with --done flag using argparse; flag is backward-compatible (absent = default routing behavior).
Refine status visibility to show active memo/actionable notes and hide stale history with counters; surface stale P0/P1 bug warnings (P0 pending >1d, P1 pending >3d).
Maintain full audit/history retrieval through list-updates.
out_of_scope: Auto-completing parent feature when any child task closes.
Removing execution_complete gate for feature_delivery workflow.
Destructive cleanup of historical update records.
risks: Over-aggressive quick close can produce false done signals without evidence checks.
If visibility filter is too strict, critical context may be hidden from status view.
Inconsistent task-parent linkage can produce orphan task states.

acceptance_scenarios: Scenario: standalone quick task closes in one step and does not require /prog-done on a feature.
Scenario: feature task closure updates task progress only; parent feature still requires explicit completion gate.
Scenario: profile gate matrix enforces different validation depths per item class.
Scenario: status output keeps actionable context visible while reporting hidden-history count.
Scenario: list-updates exposes complete historical notes for audit and recovery.

sprint_contract.scope: Implement task execution/closure semantics and visibility policy that align with profile routing while preserving current feature lifecycle guarantees.
done_criteria: Standalone task and feature-task flows are explicitly differentiated in command behavior and docs.
Profile-based done gate rules are test-covered and deterministic.
/prog next --done flag exists in CLI; /prog next without --done produces no regression.
All profiles (including quick_task) create a branch on start and squash-merge on close; no profile writes WIP commits directly to main.
quick_task close path does not acquire MUTATING_COMMANDS outer lock (no nested lock deadlock matching BUG-002 pattern).
/prog status shows actionable updates by default, hidden history summary, and stale P0/P1 bug warnings.
Full history remains accessible through list-updates without mutation or loss.
test_plan: Behavior tests for /prog next and /prog next --done across profile types.
Validation tests ensuring parent feature completion gate still requires execution_complete path.
Status rendering tests for active-vs-history filters and hidden-count summaries.
Audit tests for history retrieval correctness and no-drop guarantees.

sprint_contract.scope:
改写 bug-fix skill 的 Scenario 3（修复已录入 Bug）调试流程。现有流程直接委托 systematic-debugging skill，缺乏结构化引导，AI 在新会话中会跳过证据收集和模式分析。目标：将4阶段调试方法论（收集证据→分析规律→建立假设→实施修复）内联到 Scenario 3，使 AI 无需额外上下文即可按正确顺序推进。改动仅限 skills/bug-fix/SKILL.md，不改 CLI 和 progress.json 结构。

## 背景

用户（@siunin）与 AI 协作调试时发现，现有 Scenario 3 直接调用 systematic-debugging skill 后进入 TDD，缺少两个关键环节：
1. 证据收集——AI 在新会话中不知道崩溃时的复现路径、日志输出、输入条件
2. 假设唯一性——systematic-debugging 会列出假设但不会验证该假设是否唯一成立

最有价值的改进点是：
- 结构化证据收集：复现路径、错误日志、输入→输出对比
- 触发模式分析：稳定触发条件、边界条件识别
- 唯一性验证：确认提出的假设是唯一成立原因，排除竞争假设
- 回归检查：问题A已消失且功能B未受影响
done_criteria: Scenario 3 新增『证据收集』步骤：明确列出需收集的项目（复现路径、错误日志、输入→输出对比），每项有明确输出物
Scenario 3 新增『触发模式分析』步骤：引导 AI 识别稳定触发条件和边界条件
假设建立环节明确要求：验证该假设是唯一成立原因，排除所有竞争假设
TDD 完成后有显式回归检查模板：确认问题A已消失且功能B未受影响（含检查清单）
原有 systematic-debugging / TDD / git-auto 委托调用保持不变，仅在前插入结构化步骤
Scenario 1（列表查看 bug）和 Scenario 2（排期/优先级）不受任何影响
test_plan: 对比修改前后 Scenario 3 的步骤数量和覆盖项，确认4阶段均有对应步骤和输出物
用一个虚构 Bug 走读修改后的完整流程，检查每个阶段是否有明确交付标准
确认 Scenario 1 和 Scenario 2 的步骤/输出/命令无任何变化（diff = 空）

features.name: Git Squash Merge SOP — 集成到 prog-done 自动化流程
test_steps: feature 分支有多个中间 commit 时执行 prog done，确认合入 main 后只增加 1 个 squash commit，分支自动删除
main 分支 git log 中不出现 WIP/fix typo/chore 类中间 commit，每个 feature 对应一个语义完整的 commit
project_memory.json 中 CAP 记录的 commit_hash 正确指向 squash 后的最终 commit
Feature 分支在 squash merge 完成后自动清理：删除本地分支+远程 tracking 分支，失败非阻塞
已有仓库可选执行历史 squash+hash remap 脚本，所有追踪文件中的旧 hash 正确更新为新 hash

change_spec.why: 每个 work item 无论 profile 类型（feature / task / bug）都应在合入 main 时产生恰好 1 个语义完整的 commit；WIP/调试/fix typo 类中间 commit 不应污染 main 历史。
in_scope: Squash merge 适用于所有使用分支的 workflow profile（quick_task / standard_task / feature_delivery / hotfix）；main 始终每个 work item 对应 1 个 commit。
quick_task / standard_task squash 范围：分支创建到关闭的所有 commit → 1 commit；message 格式：task(scope): 描述。
feature_delivery squash 范围：保持原设计（feat(scope): 描述 + 详细 body）；通过完整 prog-done gate 触发。
profile-aware squash 触发点：quick_task/standard_task 走轻量关闭路径；feature_delivery 走完整 prog-done gate；两者共用同一 squash-merge 工具函数。
状态一致性：project_memory.json 和 sprint_ledger.jsonl 的 commit_hash 始终指向 squash 后的最终 commit，所有 profile 均适用。
out_of_scope: Unrelated refactors and behavior changes outside this feature.
risks: Potential regression in adjacent workflows; verify with listed test_steps.

acceptance_scenarios: Scenario: feature 分支有多个中间 commit 时执行 prog done，确认合入 main 后只增加 1 个 squash commit，分支自动删除
Scenario: main 分支 git log 中不出现 WIP/fix typo/chore 类中间 commit，每个 feature 对应一个语义完整的 commit
Scenario: project_memory.json 中 CAP 记录的 commit_hash 正确指向 squash 后的最终 commit
Scenario: Feature 分支在 squash merge 完成后自动清理：删除本地分支+远程 tracking 分支，失败非阻塞
Scenario: 已有仓库可选执行历史 squash+hash remap 脚本，所有追踪文件中的旧 hash 正确更新为新 hash

sprint_contract.scope:
在 prog 插件中集成全 profile Git Squash Merge 工作流，使每个 work item（feature / task / bug，无论 profile 类型）在合入 main 时只产生一个语义完整的 commit，杜绝中间调试/WIP/fix typo/chore 类碎片 commit 污染 main 分支历史。

## 背景与动机

当前仓库 main 分支有 379 个 commit（统计日期 2026-05-11）：
- 163 个 feat、65 个 fix、50 个 chore、32 个 docs、25 个 merge commit
- Feature/task 内部试错过程的快照全保留在主分支
- 例如 F8（fail-closed release gate）有 21 个 commit、git-auto v2.2 有 15 个、F5（progressive disclosure）有 13 个
- 这些中间 commit 对代码阅读者提供零价值，只增加 git log 噪声和 bisect 成本

## 业界标准参考

| 公司/项目 | 做法 |
|-----------|------|
| GitHub 自身 | PR squash merge，一个 PR = 一个 commit |
| GitLab 默认 | squash merge |
| VS Code 仓库 | rebase + merge 保持线性历史 |
| Google/Meta/Microsoft | 同等理念：main 只保留逻辑单元 |

核心理念：**main 分支只保留有意义的『逻辑单元』，不保留开发的试错过程。** 所有 profile 分支内的中间 commit 在合入后即失去价值。

## 设计原则

1. **所有 profile 分支**：保留中间 commit，开发过程中可自由提交
2. **Squash merge**：合入 main 时所有中间 commit 压成一个；message 格式按 profile：feature_delivery 用 feat(scope)，task 类用 task(scope)
3. **状态一致性**：追踪文件中的 commit_hash 始终指向 squash 后的最终 commit（非中间 commit），所有 profile 均适用
4. **SOP 闭环**：feature_delivery 通过 prog-done gate 触发；quick_task/standard_task 通过轻量关闭路径触发；两者不可绕过
done_criteria: git auto done 执行 squash merge：将 feature 分支所有 commit 压成一个，commit message 格式为 feat(scope): 功能描述 + 详细 body
main 分支验证：git log 确认该 feature 只增加了 1 个 commit，无 WIP/fix typo/chore 碎片混入
project_memory.json CAP 记录的 commit_hash 等于 git log main -1 --format=%H（squash 后的最终 hash）
sprint_ledger.jsonl artifact_path 和 metadata 与 squash 后的状态一致，无旧 hash 残留
Feature 分支在 squash merge 成功后自动清理：git branch -d <feature-branch> + git push origin --delete（失败非阻塞）
feature-complete SKILL.md Step 5 显式包含 squash merge 检查项，标注为不可跳过
新增测试 test_squash_merge_flow.py：覆盖成功路径、冲突路径、cleanup 失败路径
边界情况：feature 分支只有 1 个 commit 时 squash 退化为普通 merge，不产生额外操作或报错
可选工具：历史 remap 脚本将指定范围的旧 commit 压缩为新 commit 并更新所有追踪文件中的 hash 引用
quick_task 和 standard_task 关闭路径执行 squash merge：branch → 1 commit on main；commit message 格式 task(scope): 描述；WIP commit 不出现在 main。
git log main 中每个 work item（无论 profile 类型）对应且仅对应 1 个 commit；main 上不出现任何 profile 的 WIP 碎片 commit。
test_plan: 单元测试：新增 test_squash_merge_flow.py，覆盖 merge 成功、冲突退出、cleanup 失败非阻塞三个路径
集成测试：mock 一个包含 5 个 commit 的 feature 分支，执行 git auto done，验证 main 最终新增 1 个 commit
契约测试：prog done 执行后 project_memory.json CAP hash == git log main -1 --format=%H
回归测试：现有 feature-complete 流程所有测试不受影响（squash 作为增强步骤，非替换）
手动验证：在真实 feature 分支上运行 prog done，检查 GitHub PR 页面显示 '1 commit'
边界测试：feature 分支只有 1 个 commit → squash 退化为普通 merge，无额外操作

updates.summary: F13 planning frozen: AI-only intent classification for prog-smart
updates.details: Decision: remove backend auto-classification fallback; AI decides bug/feature/update. Ambiguous inputs must ask one clarification question before mutation.
updates.next_action: When F13 is active, implement /prog-smart command+skill and add ambiguity no-mutation tests

updates.summary: F14 planning frozen: /prog note visibility split into active memo vs history
updates.details: Decision: /prog should prioritize actionable/recent memo context and avoid stale note noise; full historical notes stay accessible via list-updates.
updates.next_action: When F14 is active, implement status/md filtering and hidden-history summary plus regression tests

updates.summary: F13/F14 rebaselined: unified work-item architecture with profile-driven /prog next routing
updates.details: Adopted two-layer execution model: standalone task flow and feature-bound flow. Introduced workflow_profile concept (quick_task/standard_task/feature_delivery/hotfix) to control branch requirement, verification depth, and done gate strictness. Intake will use candidate->clarify->confirm->commit to prevent title-only or ambiguous writes.
updates.next_action: Draft schema-compatible rollout plan and command contracts before code mutation

updates.summary: Execution strategy captured: /prog next selects tasks first, feature done gate remains explicit
updates.details: Agreed operational rule: /prog next should select next actionable item across classes, but only feature_delivery path requires full execution_complete + /prog-done closeout. quick_task may close via one-step action, while feature tasks advance parent progress only.
updates.next_action: Implement minimal task state fields and add profile-aware next/done behavior tests

updates.summary: 执行顺序确定：BUG-002 hotfix → BUG-003/004 hotfix → F13 → F14 → F15 → F16
updates.details: P0/P1 bug 不等待新 feature 开发，立即走 /prog-fix 独立修复通道。BUG-002（complete 嵌套锁死）优先级最高，单独 hotfix；BUG-003/004 共享同一根因（planning:review 未接入状态机），批量一次修复。BUG-005（P2）低优先级，随 F13 实现时回填 routing_queue 自然调度。F13 实现完成后，存量 pending bug 通过 routing_queue 回填机制进入正常调度流程。
updates.next_action: 立即启动 BUG-002 hotfix：定位 progress_manager.py:11145/11341 的嵌套锁路径并重构

bugs.description: Python falsy trap: current_feature_id=0 被 not 误判为 None，导致 set-workflow-state/auto_checkpoint/wf_auto_driver/route_status 等函数在 feature ID 为 0 时异常跳过
bugs.root_cause: Python truthy/falsy trap: not 0 == True，导致 ID=0 的 feature 被误判为不存在

investigation.root_cause: Python truthy/falsy trap: not 0 == True，导致 ID=0 的 feature 被误判为不存在

bugs.description: P0: complete 重定向后被外层锁卡死。complete 走 MUTATING_COMMANDS 外层 progress_transaction()，但 cmd_done 内部路径（record_sprint_artifact、嵌套 prog 命令）会再次拿锁，导致 10 秒锁超时，RC=9。关键位置: progress_manager.py:11145, 11341
bugs.next_action: 立即修复：定位 progress_manager.py:11145/11341，将 cmd_done 内部嵌套 prog 调用改为直接函数调用，绕过外层锁路径
bugs.root_cause: complete 在 MUTATING_COMMANDS 中但未加入 done 的锁豁免分支（progress_manager.py:11490），导致 _dispatch_command() 被 progress_transaction() 包裹。cmd_done() 的 _run_acceptance_tests() 通过 subprocess.run 调用嵌套 prog 命令，子进程无法感知父进程持有的 fcntl.LOCK_EX 锁，等待 10 秒超时后返回 RC=9。

investigation.root_cause: complete 在 MUTATING_COMMANDS 中但未加入 done 的锁豁免分支（progress_manager.py:11490），导致 _dispatch_command() 被 progress_transaction() 包裹。cmd_done() 的 _run_acceptance_tests() 通过 subprocess.run 调用嵌套 prog 命令，子进程无法感知父进程持有的 fcntl.LOCK_EX 锁，等待 10 秒超时后返回 RC=9。

bugs.fix_summary: Fix applied (commit: ab3a38d99d090a629d71065e19ddb2d124ba249b) — progress_manager.py:11490 extend lock exemption to {done, complete}; regression test added (925 tests pass).

bugs.description: P1: planning:review phase 未接入状态机。skill 已引入 planning:review 停点，但 wf_state_machine.py 映射只有 planning:draft/clarifying/approved，导致 compute_next_action() 对 planning:review 返回 None。关键位置: wf_state_machine.py:21-27
bugs.next_action: 与 BUG-004 批量修复：在 wf_state_machine.py:21-27 补全 planning:review 状态映射，确保 compute_next_action() 返回有效值
bugs.fix_summary: 与 BUG-004 同一次改动修复：wf_state_machine.py:21-27 补全 planning:review 状态映射，compute_next_action() 现在对 planning:review 返回 resume_planning_draft

bugs.description: P1: 恢复策略未覆盖 planning:review，降级为 manual_review。determine_recovery_action() 只覆盖 planning:draft/clarifying/approved，writing planning:review 后走 manual_review 分支，与 skill 定义的单次审批恢复路径不一致。关键位置: progress_manager.py:6439-6462

bugs.fix_summary: 与 BUG-003 同一次改动修复：progress_manager.py:6439-6462 的 determine_recovery_action() 补全 planning:review 分支，返回单次审批恢复路径
